name: Peanut Butter Brownie Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 package Betty Crocker Fudge Brownie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the brownie mix according to the package directions.
2. Fill paper-lined muffin cups 2/3 full with the batter.
3. Unwrap the peanut butter cups and press them into the center of each "muffin" until they meet the top edge of the candy.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes.
Makes 15 to 18 servings.
